text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're past the fourth corner and heading into
the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (This is it! Now's the time for me to—)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(My legs feel... heavy... But now is when I need to
make my move!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Fan favorite Satono Diamond has failed to win
the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Aw... She couldn't quite pull it off. I guess Satono
Diamond hasn't improved as much as I thought.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it looked like she was struggling there at
the end. Maybe long distances are tough for her.
choice_data_list: (That wasn't the best she can do.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something felt off about during the race. Satono
Diamond was clearly feeling tired near the end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have spent too much energy running to
the racecourse earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it she hadn't done that, she wouldn't have
made it in time for the race. Our hands were tied,
but still...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(It took everything I had just to run all 2,000
meters... I never had a chance for first with that
kind of performance...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (If I was just a little stronger...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list: Sorry for making you run here.
Sorry for making you run here.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?! There's no need for you to apologize!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I thought getting out of the taxi and running was
the best decision as well!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But... of all the days for a storm. And losing like
that, without being able to put everything into
the race...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The Satono family is jinxed. We can never win a
G1 race. That goes for me as well...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But I won't lose next time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I will be the one to break this jinx!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Next is the Japanese Derby, where I'll break the
jinx and show everyone that our family can win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's declaration rings with
determination. This spate of misfortune appears
to have strengthened her resolve to break the
jinx.
